resumo: The book of origins: creation, the fall, and the beginning of the covenant through the patriarchs.
The liberation of Israel from Egypt and the establishment of the Law at Sinai.
Laws regarding holiness, sacrifices, and the priesthood of Israel.
The census and the forty-year journey through the wilderness.
Moses' final speeches and the repetition of the Law for the new generation.
The conquest of the Promised Land under Joshua's leadership.
Cycles of rebellion and deliverance through charismatic leaders.
A story of loyalty and redemption in the lineage of King David.
The transition from judges to kingship; the lives of Samuel, Saul, and David.
The reign of King David and the establishment of Jerusalem as the capital.
Solomon's reign and the subsequent division of the kingdom.
The history of the divided kingdoms leading to their exile.
Genealogies and a spiritual perspective on David's reign.
From Solomon to the Babylonian exile, focusing on the kings of Judah.
The return from exile and the rebuilding of the Temple in Jerusalem.
The rebuilding of Jerusalem's walls and spiritual reformation.
God's providential protection of the Jewish people in Persia.
A poetic exploration of suffering and God's sovereignty.
A collection of 150 songs and prayers expressing the full range of human emotion.
Practical wisdom for living a life of character and fear of the Lord.
A philosophical reflection on the meaning of life 'under the sun'.
A poetic celebration of love and intimacy in marriage.
Prophecies of judgment and comfort, pointing to the coming Messiah.
The 'weeping prophet' warns Judah of coming judgment and exile.
Poetic dirges mourning the destruction of Jerusalem.
Visions of God's glory and the promise of Israel's future restoration.
Stories of faithfulness and apocalyptic visions of God's kingdom.
A prophet's marriage illustrates God's faithful love for unfaithful Israel.
The Day of the Lord and the promise of the Spirit being poured out.
A call for social justice and true worship among God's people.
A prophecy of judgment against Edom for their mistreatment of Israel.
A reluctant prophet discovers God's mercy extends even to enemies.
A call to do justice, love mercy, and walk humbly with God.
A prophecy of the certain destruction of Nineveh.
A prophet's struggle with God's use of the wicked to execute judgment.
The coming judgment upon Judah and the hope of a purified remnant.
A call to finish rebuilding the Temple after the exile.
Visions of hope and prophecies regarding the coming Messiah.
A rebuke for spiritual apathy and the promise of a future messenger.
Jesus is the Messiah and King who fulfills the Old Testament prophecies.
A fast-paced account of Jesus as the suffering Servant and Son of God.
A detailed gospel presenting Jesus as the Savior for all humanity.
A spiritual gospel emphasizing Jesus as the eternal Word and Son of God.
The birth of the Church and the spread of the gospel to the ends of the earth.
A theological masterpiece on salvation by grace through faith.
Paul addresses problems and questions within the church at Corinth.
Paul defends his apostolic authority and shares the nature of ministry.
A defense of Christian liberty against those who demand adherence to the law.
The blessings of Christ and the unity of the Church as His body.
A joyful letter written from prison, encouraging contentment in Christ.
The preeminence of Christ and our completeness in Him.
Encouragement for a young church and teachings on the second coming.
Clarification on the 'Day of the Lord' and a call to steadfastness.
Instructions for church leadership and sound doctrine.
Paul's final letter, encouraging Timothy to remain faithful to the gospel.
Guidance on appointing leaders and living out godliness in Crete.
A personal plea for a runaway slave now brother in Christ.
The superiority of Christ over the Old Covenant system.
Practical wisdom on living out a genuine faith through works.
Hope and encouragement for Christians facing suffering and persecution.
A warning against false teachers and a reminder of Christ's return.
Assurance of salvation and the necessity of walking in love and truth.
A brief letter emphasizing love and warning against deceivers.
A letter concerning hospitality and church conflict.
A call to contend for the faith against ungodly influences.
A visionary revelation of Christ's final victory and the new creation.
